# attributedMarkedText

**Instance Property**

Attributed string for the text that has been marked as part of an active input session

## Declaration

```swift
var attributedMarkedText: NSAttributedString? { get }
```

## Marking text

- **markedText**: String for the text that has been marked as part of an active input session
- **markedTextRange**: Range representing the position of the markedText.
- **hasMarkedText**: Indicates whether there any text is currently marked as part of an active input session
- **setMarkedText(_:selectedRange:)**: Inserts the provided text and marks it to indicate that it is part of an active input session.
- **setAttributedMarkedText(_:selectedRange:)**: Inserts the provided styled text and marks it to indicate that it is part of an active input session.
- **unmarkText()**: Unmarks the currently marked text
- **isPointNearMarkedText(_:)**: Returns whether a point should be considered “near” the marked text. Used to determine whether text interaction gestures near marked text should begin.
